parsed.rationale: Three non-trivial business rules surface from Tableau that the wiki does not document: (1) a six-category transaction-type taxonomy derived from the combination of MIMOAction, IsInternalTransfer, and IsTradeFromIBAN; (2) an eMoney MOP reclassification that splits WireTransfer into OpenBanking vs WireTransfer via a cross-table lookup; (3) a Net Deposits KPI definition that excludes FundingTypeID 33 for Trading and internal transfers for eMoney.

table_findings.name: Transaction Description taxonomy
table_findings.summary: Downstream dashboards classify every MIMO row into one of six business categories by combining MIMOAction, IsInternalTransfer, and IsTradeFromIBAN: 'Internal Transfer: Local Account → USD Account' (Deposit+Internal+¬IBAN), 'Internal Transfer: USD Account → Local Account' (Withdraw+Internal+¬IBAN), 'Open Position from Local Account' (Deposit+Internal+IBAN), 'Close Position to Local Account' (Withdraw+Internal+IBAN), 'Deposit from External' (Deposit+¬Internal+¬IBAN), 'Withdraw to External' (Withdraw+¬Internal+¬IBAN).
table_findings.formula: IF MIMOAction='Deposit' AND IsInternalTransfer=1 AND IsTradeFromIBAN=0 THEN 'Internal Transfer: Local Account → USD Account' ELSEIF MIMOAction='Withdraw' AND IsInternalTransfer=1 AND IsTradeFromIBAN=0 THEN 'Internal Transfer: USD Account → Local Account' ELSEIF MIMOAction='Deposit' AND IsInternalTransfer=1 AND IsTradeFromIBAN=1 THEN 'Open Position from Local Account' ELSEIF MIMOAction='Withdraw' AND IsInternalTransfer=1 AND IsTradeFromIBAN=1 THEN 'Close Position to Local Account' ELSEIF MIMOAction='Deposit' AND IsInternalTransfer=0 AND IsTradeFromIBAN=0 THEN 'Deposit from External' ELSEIF MIMOAction='Withdraw' AND IsInternalTransfer=0 AND IsTradeFromIBAN=0 THEN 'Withdraw to External' ELSE 'Other / Unclassified' END

table_findings.name: eMoney MOP reclassification (OpenBanking vs WireTransfer)
table_findings.summary: For eMoney-platform external deposits (IsInternalTransfer=0 AND IsTradeFromIBAN=0), the standard Dim_FundingType name is replaced by a cross-table lookup: if the transaction's ReferenceNumber matches an approved (TransferStatusID=10) record in External_MoneyTransfer_Billing_Transfers, the MOP is 'OpenBanking'; otherwise it falls back to 'WireTransfer'. Non-eMoney or internal/IBAN transactions use the standard Dim_FundingType.Name.
table_findings.formula: CASE WHEN MIMOPlatform='eMoney' AND IsInternalTransfer=0 AND IsTradeFromIBAN=0 THEN (CASE WHEN External_MoneyTransfer_Billing_Transfers.CID IS NOT NULL THEN 'OpenBanking' ELSE 'WireTransfer' END) ELSE Dim_FundingType.Name END

table_findings.name: Net Deposits KPI (AML context)
table_findings.summary: Net Deposits is defined as (Trading Deposits − Trading Withdrawals + eMoney Inbound − eMoney Outbound), where Trading flows exclude FundingTypeID 33 and eMoney flows exclude internal transfers (IsInternalTransfer=1). This KPI is used for AML-flagged customers sourced from BI_DB_AML_BI_Alerts_New and BI_DB_RiskAlertManagementTool (CategoryName='AML').
table_findings.formula: SUM(CASE WHEN MIMOPlatform='TradingPlatform' AND MIMOAction='Deposit' AND FundingTypeID<>33 THEN AmountUSD ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN MIMOPlatform='TradingPlatform' AND MIMOAction='Withdraw' AND FundingTypeID<>33 THEN AmountUSD ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN MIMOPlatform='eMoney' AND MIMOAction='Deposit' AND IsInternalTransfer=0 THEN AmountUSD ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN MIMOPlatform='eMoney' AND MIMOAction='Withdraw' AND IsInternalTransfer=0 THEN AmountUSD ELSE 0 END)
source_workbooks: AML Clients – Trading & eMoney Net Deposits

column_findings.name: FundingTypeID 33 exclusion
column_findings.summary: FundingTypeID 33 is excluded from Trading Platform deposit and withdrawal calculations in the Net Deposits KPI, indicating it represents a non-cash or non-standard funding type that should not count toward real money movement on the Trading Platform.
column_findings.source_workbook: AML Clients – Trading & eMoney Net Deposits
